name: The Jacket Indoor Golf
about: The Jacket Indoor Golf & Sports Bar offers state-of-the-art indoor golf experiences in an upscale, comfortable setting. The facility features advanced Trackman technology, allowing players to enjoy 250+ golf courses, practice sessions, and games year-round. It caters to a diverse clientele, from those seeking a quick 9 holes on a lunch break to groups hosting birthday parties, corporate events, or casual nights out. Membership packages provide benefits like early booking, discounted rates, and complimentary monthly bay access, while non-members can also rent bays by the hour.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman iO technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Upscale atmosphere with a full-service sports bar and diverse dining options
Flexible booking for casual play, leagues, lessons, and private events
Convenient location open year-round, rain or shine
250+ virtual golf courses available for play

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant menu available at The Back 9 Bar and Grill, featuring classic bar food and diverse dining options
Full bar with local craft beers, wine, and craft cocktails available; members receive 20% discount on food and drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Combines radar, infrared and high-speed imaging to deliver real-time data including 3D spin and spin axis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental sets are available for $10, and free club rentals are offered for Players Club and Corporate members.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed; The Back 9 Bar and Grill offers a full restaurant menu and bar service.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A round of golf usually takes about an hour for an average player; it's recommended to add an additional hour for each player in your group when reserving a bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Jacket is family-friendly and offers activities for all ages, making it suitable for family outings and birthday parties.
